chunks.text: My EECS Info Guide - EECS at Berkeley My EECS Info Guide My EECS Info is the interface faculty use to update their department home page and research information. This information is tied to the ACG database system. Staff who are in the faculty dire

atabase system. Staff who are in the faculty directory database as assistants for a particular faculty member have access to edit information for that faculty. https://www2.eecs.berkeley.edu/deptinfo There is a link to My EECS Info at the bottom of

There is a link to My EECS Info at the bottom of every department web page in the Resources column. Photos If would like to add or change a photo on your web page, please send a large format .jpg version to: eecsfac-updates@eecs.berkeley.edu Help Up

sion to: eecsfac-updates@eecs.berkeley.edu Help Updates to faculty and research information: eecsfac-updates@eecs.berkeley.edu Questions about graduate student information: EE: grads-ee@berkeley.edu / CS: grads-cs@berkeley.edu Questions about web pag

lse that shows up on your departmental faculty homepage. The links in bold type (student award nomination form, etc.) go to helpful information or are pointers to other apps. They are not part of the My EECS Info system. Resources Information for Cu
